_note: Manual quarterly competitor estimates. Update each quarter. Sources: public Play Store rankings, SimilarWeb, AppTweak free tier, industry reports. No API — owner fills these in.
_update_instructions: Edit these values each quarter based on: App Store rankings, SimilarWeb traffic estimates, industry blogs, and your own download analytics from Play Console once wired.

competitors.name: HealthifyMe
competitors.key_strengths: Market leader, AI calorie counting, vernacular support, strong brand
competitors.key_weaknesses: Generic plans, expensive premium, bloated app
competitors.nyus_advantage: Personalized AI coach, Indian meal plans, clean UX, affordable

competitors.name: Cult.fit
competitors.key_strengths: Offline gyms + live classes, strong community, diverse content
competitors.key_weaknesses: High cost, gym-dependent, not truly personalized nutrition
competitors.nyus_advantage: AI-first nutrition + workout, lower cost, no gym needed

competitors.name: MyFitnessPal
competitors.key_strengths: Massive food database, brand recognition, barcode scanning
competitors.key_weaknesses: Generic, no Indian meal plans, no AI coaching, US-centric
competitors.nyus_advantage: Indian-first, AI coach, workout plans, holistic (not just calories)

competitors.name: Nike Training Club
competitors.key_strengths: Brand, curated workouts, clean UI, free
competitors.key_weaknesses: No nutrition, no personalization, no India focus
competitors.nyus_advantage: Full nutrition + workout + AI coaching, Indian context

competitors.name: StepSetGo
competitors.nyus_advantage: Complete health platform vs step counter

nyus_benchmarks._note: Fill these in from your Play Console + DB once tracking is wired
